name: Fudge Truffle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300°F. Prepare Chocolate Crumb Crust: In a bowl combine vanilla wafer crumbs, confectioner's sugar, cocoa powder, and margarine or butter. Press into 9-inch springform pan.
In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk, then the remaining ingredients until smooth. Pour into the pan. Bake for 1 hour and 5 minutes or until set. Cool. Chill. Garnish as desired (whipped cream is suggested). Refrigerate leftovers.
